What We Do

Every Job Done Properly

Whatever your property needs — inside or out — we've got the skills and the tools to do it right the first time.

01
Decks & Pergolas

Custom outdoor structures built to last — from timber decks to full pergola frames. Designed to suit your home and lifestyle.

02
Skylights

Professional skylight installation from roof to ceiling — watertight, clean, and flawlessly finished inside and out.

03
Cladding

External cladding that upgrades your home's look and protection. Precise fitting, quality materials, lasting results.

04
Frame & Lockup

Structural framing done properly from the ground up. We work fast without cutting corners — your build starts right.

05
Fencing & Landscaping

Functional, well-built fencing and landscaping that adds kerb appeal and value to your property.

06
General Maintenance

Repairs, fixes, and general carpentry work. No job too small — we show up, we do it right, and we leave it clean.

5★ Rated
Why Raw Edge

Why Tradies & Homeowners Choose Us

There's no shortage of carpenters out there. Here's what makes Raw Edge different — and why clients call Sam back every time.

🎯
No Dodgy Work — Ever

We don't cut corners. Every joint, every frame, every finish is done to a standard we're proud to put our name on.

📅
We Show Up On Time

Reliability is rare in trades. We show up when we say we will, keep you updated, and finish on schedule.

💬
Straight Talking, Fair Pricing

Free quotes, no hidden costs, no runaround. You'll know exactly what you're getting before we start.

🔨
Proper Tradesmen, Not Cowboys

Sam and the team bring real experience to every job — skylights, cladding, frames, and full renos done right.

What Clients Say

Real Words From Real Clients
